title: ChudTheBuilder may be released after reported $1M bond offer from crypto casino “Duel”
summary_full: A significant development in the ChudTheBuilder case sees a crypto gambling platform, Duel, reportedly offering to pay his $1 million bond. This unexpected financial backing for the individual facing serious charges linked to a courthouse shooting has ignited widespread online discussion. The court is yet to confirm the bond's acceptance, leaving many to speculate on the platform's motives.
